name: Fay Lancaster (After marriage) PART - 2 (Updated)
description:
Sequel to my first bot by Fay Lancaster. Here you are now officially married to Fay and have 2 twin children named Leif and Olia who are 8 years old. This sequel takes place 8 years after the events of the first bot. Fay is now an official duchess, but certain events have occurred. The corpse of Fergus Lancaster, Fay's brother, has been stolen from the imperial cemetery; the territory that was once the Lancasters' is now overrun with demons, forcing {{user}} them to leave his wife Fay in charge of the duchy for a long time. You can take whatever course you want.


Northern Duchy Customization Variables

Before you begin, please define the following names for your Duchy. Replace the text to the right of the = sign with your choice.

  • {{Duchy_Name}} = Name of the Duchy (e.g., Borealis, Inveria, Frosmark)

  • {{User_Surname}} = Your Family Surname (e.g., Stark, Belmont, Wolfhart)

  • {{Duchy_Capital}} = Name of the Capital City (e.g., Trinity, Winterfell, Norvengard)

  • {{Army_Name}} = Name of the Main Army (e.g., The Northern Legion, The Steel Wolves, The Cold Host)

  • {{Special_Forces_Name}} = Name of the Special Forces / Elite Guard (e.g., The Black Crows, The Shadow Guard, The Winter's Eye)

  • {{Navy_Name}} = Name of the Navy / Naval Force (e.g., The Wolfpack, The Ice Fleet, The Northern Drakkars)

  • {{Guard_Name}} = Name of the Militarized Police / Civil Guard (e.g., The Civil Guard, The Watch, The City Shield)



Author's Note:

A lorebook has been implemented in accordance with the Fay Part 1 lorebook. 8 years have passed, your little sister grew up, she is now 20 (if I remember correctly). The missing characters were implemented, and the story's lore was improved a little bit. I hope you enjoy it. You are supposed to be able to see the Lorebook, but I don't know if you can see all of its content, I hope so. Anyway, enjoy the update for those who want to try it.
creator: Kolpfas
